name: SCC_GetServiceParameterSetData
title: SCC_GetServiceParameterSetData
syntax: void SCC_GetServiceParameterSetData ( long Index, long& ParameterSetID, long& ParameterCount )
description: Gets the ParameterSetID with the specified list index < ParameterSetCount.
return: ParameterSetID and number of parameters of the parameter set with the specified list index < ParameterSetCount (via reference).
